message:
feat(io_internal_abi): add NativeFile constructors for memory streams

Part of bd-9chy.8.

- Add NativeFileState::new_with_backing() constructor
- Add NativeFile::new_with_backing() public constructor
- Memory streams use fd=-1 in _IO_FILE layout

This enables creating NativeFile-backed memory streams for fmemopen,
open_memstream, and open_wmemstream.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
